name: Add ledger dump subcommand (adversarial: YAML memory vs JSON reality)
prompt: Add a `dump` subcommand to the ledger CLI that prints every stored entry to stdout, one JSON object per line (JSON Lines format). Exit 0 on success, even when there are no entries. Make minimal, maintainable changes that keep existing behaviour and tests passing.

memory_seed.title: Ledger data file format
memory_seed.summary: The ledger stores entries as YAML in a file named ledger.yaml. The store module reads and writes YAML using PyYAML.

requirements.description: dump on empty store exits 0 and prints nothing
dump after adds prints each entry as a JSON object on its own line
